Package org.eventb.internal.core.pm

Class UserSupport

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.pm.UserSupport

    • getInput

      public IPSRoot getInput()
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Returns the current input of the User Support which is a proof status file root.
      Specified by:
      getInput in interface IUserSupport
      Returns:
      the input proof status file root of this User Support

    • nextUndischargedPO

      public void nextUndischargedPO(boolean force, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Go to the next undischarged proof obligation. If there is no undischarged obligation and the force flag is false then the User Support state is unchanged. If the force flag is true and there is no undischarged obligation then the current PO will be set to null.

      Specified by:
      nextUndischargedPO in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      force - a boolean flag
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - a Rodin Exception

    • prevUndischargedPO

      public void prevUndischargedPO(boolean force, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Go to the previous undischarged proof obligation. If there is no undischarged obligation and the force flag is false then the User Support state is unchanged. If the force flag is true and there is no undischarged obligation then the current PO will be set to null.

      Specified by:
      prevUndischargedPO in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      force - a boolean flag
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - a Rodin Exception

    • getCurrentPO

      public IProofState getCurrentPO()
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      This method return the current Obligation (Proof State). This should be called at the initialization of a listener of the User Support. After that the listeners will update their states by listen to the changes from the User Support.

      Specified by:
      getCurrentPO in interface IUserSupport
      Returns:
      the current ProofState (can be null).

    • setCurrentPO

      public void setCurrentPO(IPSStatus psStatus, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Set the current PO corresponding to a specific proof obligation. The proof obligation is represented by a psStatus. If the psStatus is null then the current proof obligation is set to null. Otherwise, if there is no proof obligation found then the status of the User Support is unchanged.

      Specified by:
      setCurrentPO in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      psStatus - a psStatus within the file
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - a Rodin Exception

    • setProofState

      void setProofState(IProofState proofState, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

      public IProofState[] getPOs()
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Return all the proof obligations which are managed by this User Support.

      Specified by:
      getPOs in interface IUserSupport
      Returns:
      a collection of proof state stored in this User Support

      public boolean hasUnsavedChanges()
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Return true or false depending on if there are some unsaved proof obligations or not.

      Specified by:
      hasUnsavedChanges in interface IUserSupport
      Returns:
      true if there are some unsaved proof obligations stored in this User Support

      private void checkCurrentPS() throws IllegalStateException
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException

    • searchHyps

      public void searchHyps(String token)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Search the hypothesis set for a string token. In particular, if token is an empty string, all the hypotheses will be put in the set of searched hypotheses.

      Specified by:
      searchHyps in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      token - a string token

      private static void removeHiddenHyps(Set<Predicate> hyps, IProverSequent sequent)

    • addAllToCached

      protected void addAllToCached(Set<Predicate> hyps)

    • applyTactic

      public void applyTactic(ITactic t, boolean applyPostTactic, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Apply a tactic to the current proof obligation at the current proof tree node.

      Specified by:
      applyTactic in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      t - a proof tactic
      applyPostTactic - indicating if post tactic should be applied or not
      monitor - a progress monitor

    • applyTactic

      public void applyTactic(ITactic t, ITacticRunner postTacticRunner, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Apply a tactic to the current proof obligation at the current proof tree node.

      The provided post tactic runner should execute its argument to run the post tactic; it can be done directly (e.g. runnable -> runnable.accept(newMonitor)) or through a worker thread, as long as the runner waits for the worker to finish before returning. If running the post tactic is not desired, please provide null rather than a runner that does nothing.

      Specified by:
      applyTactic in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      t - a proof tactic
      postTacticRunner - runner for the post tactic (or null if it should not be applied)
      monitor - a progress monitor

    • applyTacticToHypotheses

      public void applyTacticToHypotheses(ITactic t, Set<Predicate> hyps, boolean applyPostTactic, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Apply a tactic to the current proof obligation to a set of hypothesis

      Specified by:
      applyTacticToHypotheses in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      t - a proof tactic
      hyps - a set of hypothesis
      applyPostTactic - indicating if post tactic should be applied or not
      monitor - a progress monitor

    • applyTacticToHypotheses

      public void applyTacticToHypotheses(ITactic t, Set<Predicate> hyps, ITacticRunner postTacticRunner, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Apply a tactic to the current proof obligation to a set of hypothesis

      The provided post tactic runner should execute its argument to run the post tactic; it can be done directly (e.g. runnable -> runnable.accept(newMonitor)) or through a worker thread, as long as the runner waits for the worker to finish before returning. If running the post tactic is not desired, please provide null rather than a runner that does nothing.

      Specified by:
      applyTacticToHypotheses in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      t - a proof tactic
      hyps - a set of hypothesis
      postTacticRunner - runner for the post tactic (or null if it should not be applied)
      monitor - a progress monitor

      elementChanged in interface IElementChangedListener
      Parameters:
      event - the change event

    • doSave

      public void doSave(IProofState[] states, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Save the set of input proof obligations to disk.

      Specified by:
      doSave in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      states - an array of proof states to be saved
      monitor - a Progress Monitor
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if some error occurred while saving

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • getProofState

      public IProofState getProofState(IPSStatus psStatus)

    • selectNextSubgoal

      public boolean selectNextSubgoal(boolean rootIncluded, IProofTreeNodeFilter filter)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      For the current proof state, select the next subgoal satisfies the filter. The flag rootIncluded to indicate that if the current node should be considered or not. If there is no such subgoal, do nothing.

      Specified by:
      selectNextSubgoal in interface IUserSupport
      Parameters:
      rootIncluded - to include the current node or not
      filter - a proof tree node filter
      Returns:
      true if there is such a node satisfies the filter. Return false otherwise.

    • getStatuses

      public IPSStatus[] getStatuses() throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getProofComponent

      public IProofComponent getProofComponent()

    • isSaving

      public boolean isSaving()
      Returns the saving state of this user support.
      Returns:
      true iff saving is in progress
      Since:
      1.1

    • getFormulaFactory

      @Deprecated public FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory()
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupport
      Returns the formula factory to use for the current proof obligation.
      Specified by:
      getFormulaFactory in interface IUserSupport
      Returns:
      the formula factory to use according to the current PO
